changeSet.author: copilot
changeSet.sql: INSERT INTO dbo.brand (name) SELECT DISTINCT LTRIM(RTRIM(product.brand)) FROM dbo.product product WHERE product.brand IS NOT NULL AND LTRIM(RTRIM(product.brand)) <> '' AND NOT EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM dbo.brand brand_lookup WHERE LOWER(LTRIM(RTRIM(brand_lookup.name))) = LOWER(LTRIM(RTRIM(product.brand))) );

changeSet.author: copilot
changeSet.sql: UPDATE product_row SET brand_id = brand_lookup.id FROM dbo.product product_row INNER JOIN dbo.brand brand_lookup ON LOWER(LTRIM(RTRIM(product_row.brand))) = LOWER(LTRIM(RTRIM(brand_lookup.name))) WHERE product_row.brand_id IS NULL AND product_row.brand IS NOT NULL;
